🤖 Buddy
🔒 Grown-up Setup

For a grown-up 🙂

Buddy and the smart drawing helper use Claude AI. Paste an Anthropic API key once and it stays saved on this device only.

Keep this build private — don't share it publicly with the key inside. Get a key at console.anthropic.com.

Quick check: what is 6 × 7?

Progress 📊

See what your child has been learning, how they're doing in each subject, and where they might need more practice.

Lesson plan 📋

Build today's lesson: choose activities in order for a full learn → practise → do → review day. Your child follows it step by step, then gets a quick review of anything they found tricky.

Region & spelling 🌍

Choose which English to use. This changes spellings (colour/color), the words in the Spelling Test, and whether it says "Year" or "Grade".

Homeschool 🏡

Turn this on to allow homeschool question packs and to set a different year for each subject.

Reading voice 🔊

Want a friendlier voice? Download an enhanced voice once and the app uses it automatically. Free and works offline.

Maths answers ✏️

Instead of picking from four choices, your child types the maths answer in themselves. This is harder and better for real learning — no guessing. Other subjects stay multiple-choice.

🔒 Everything your child does is stored only on this device. We have no servers, collect no personal data, and show no ads. The AI helper is off unless you add your own key above.

🔊
Get the best voice
For a much friendlier reading voice, download an enhanced voice once on this device:

1. Open Settings
2. Accessibility → Spoken Content → Voices → English
3. Pick a voice marked Enhanced or Premium (or a Siri voice) and tap to download

Then come back — the app will use it automatically. It stays free and works offline.
